assumptions: The question concerns hedge accounting in consolidated financial statements.
The dividend has been declared and has created a recognised intragroup monetary receivable/payable denominated in a foreign currency.

approaches.label: Foreign currency hedge of an intragroup monetary item
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context specifically identifies the foreign currency risk of an intragroup monetary item as a hedge accounting model addressed in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge of a forecast intragroup transaction
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context separately identifies cash flow hedge accounting for the foreign currency risk of a forecast intragroup transaction as a distinct group-related hedge model.

approaches.label: Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context includes a separate hedge accounting model for foreign currency risk arising from a net investment in a foreign operation.
